title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 260.1077
text:
*260.1077.  Financial and proprietary information not a public record. — Financial or proprietary information submitted to the department under sections 260.1050 to 260.1101 shall not be considered a public record under chapter 610.
(L. 2008 S.B. 720) 
*Contingent expiration date, see § 260.1092
